data:
create table checklistmodel
(
    id          uuid                                               not null
        constraint checklistmodel_pkey
            primary key,
    create_date timestamp with time zone default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP not null,
    update_date timestamp with time zone default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP not null,
    title       text                                               not null,
    text        text,
    sort        integer,
    short_name  text,
    state       varchar(40)                                        not null,
    space_id    uuid                                               not null
        constraint checklistmodel_space_id_fkey
            references spacemodel
            on delete cascade
);

alter table checklistmodel
    owner to vtpad_back;
